title: Please, listen to this song "CTRL+C CTRL+V" 😅😅😅🔥

content.summary: Please, listen to this song "CTRL+C CTRL+V" 😅😅😅🔥 Mat Velloso (@matvelloso) [1/n] For the past several days I’ve been working on a thing. It started as a fun prototype and then evolved. I decided to call it Unswitch. It uses software more like a person does, with the tools you already use. Meant to empower, not replace. Before the thread, here's a short video, because an image is worth a thousand words and that's part of the message anyway: Video — https://nitter.net/matvelloso/status/2035253798168396195#m
